ValidationRule.description: MIS-3958 - Update to AS #1104786 AS Requests adjustments
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $Profile.Name <> 'System Administrator', $Profile.Name <> 'SW SalesOps Extended', NOT(ISCHANGED( Invoiced_Price__c )), NOT(ISPICKVAL( Status__c , 'Cancelled')), NOT(ISPICKVAL( Status__c , 'Submitted')), NOT(ISPICKVAL( Status__c , 'Closed Lost')), RecordType.DeveloperName = "Advisory_Services_Request", OR( ISBLANK( List_price__c ), ISBLANK( ASC_AS_Consultant_effort__c ), ISBLANK( ASDE_effort__c ), ISBLANK( Link_to_Proposal__c ), ISBLANK( Start_Contract_Date__c ), ISBLANK( End_Contract_Date__c), ISBLANK(TEXT(AS_Deal_Type__c)) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please fill List Price, ASDE Estimated Effort (days), ASC Estimated Effort (days), Link to Proposal, Start Project Date, End Project Date
